message:
fix(kubernetes): drop `const fn` on string matchers to unblock fcp-e2e

The nightly toolchain still gates `PartialEq` for `&str` in const
contexts, so `matches!` over string literals inside `const fn` fails
with E0658. `fcp-e2e` pulls `fcp-kubernetes` as a dev-dependency, so
the connector compile failure cascaded into unrelated test lanes.

Drops `const` from is_secret_mutation, is_system_namespace,
is_shell_binary, and approval_for_operation. The functions are not
used in any const context; removing `const` is sufficient and
minimal.

Fixes: flywheel_connectors-q0y8h

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
